source_name: Code4rena Noya Findings and Analysis Report (2024-04)
finding_title: Invalid calculation of position TVL in Pendle connector
summary: Pendle connector allows protocol managers to deposit some underlying asset in return for some SY tokens, which can be used to mint PT and YT tokens. PT and YT can be deposited in markets and in return for LP tokens and some claimable rewards. These LP tokens should be considered when calculating the TVL of the position, to do this the protocol is using getLpToAssetRate, which from the docs:
root_cause: incorrect accounting or validation logic in Invalid calculation of position TVL in Pendle connector, causing the protocol to compute or enforce the wrong state transition
broken_invariants: the reward distribution path must not allow the condition described by "Invalid calculation of position TVL in Pendle connector" to change user balances, collateralization, or protocol availability unexpectedly
oracle, TVL, and collateral valuation must use correctly scaled, fresh, and manipulation-resistant inputs
reward and distribution accounting must preserve each participant’s accrued value across claims, transfers, and configuration changes
attack_preconditions: the affected component is deployed or configured in the way described by the final report
the report-described user, keeper, vault, connector, oracle, or liquidation flow is reachable in the audited code version
attacker_capability: external user, keeper, liquidator, vault participant, or protocol-integrated actor able to trigger the affected flow
trigger_actions: execute the report-described function sequence or state transition
observe mispricing, accounting drift, value loss, fund lock, or denial of service

impact.description: Pendle connector allows protocol managers to deposit some underlying asset in return for some SY tokens, which can be used to mint PT and YT tokens. PT and YT can be deposited in markets and in return for LP tokens and some claimable rewards. These LP tokens should be considered when calculating the TVL of the position, to do this the protocol is using getLpToAssetRate, which from the docs:

why_not_higher: already classified as High in the final C4 report
why_not_lower: included as a validated High/Medium C4 finding with public report evidence and affected code/finding references
common_false_positive_angles: verify the same component and configuration are in scope
check whether the issue is reachable by an untrusted or economically motivated actor
confirm the impact is more than a view-only mismatch, dust loss, or privileged-only misconfiguration
mitigations: Refactor PendleConnector::_getPositionTVL to take into consideration that getLpToAssetRate and getPtToAssetRate calculate the price of LP in terms of the underlying asset and not SY.
